pokemon:ledian.name: Ledian
pokemon:ledian.summary: It is said that in lands with clean air, where the stars fill the sky, there live Ledian in countless numbers. There is a good reason for this—the Pokémon uses the light of the stars as its energy.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It is said that in lands with clean air, where the stars fill the sky, there live Ledian in countless numbers. There is a good reason for this—the Pokémon uses the light of the stars as its energy.
It uses starlight as energy. When more stars appear at night, the patterns on its back grow larger.
It uses starlight as energy. When more stars appear at night, the patterns on its back grow larger.
In the daytime when it gets warm, it curls up inside a big leaf and drifts off into a deep slumber.
It uses starlight as energy. When more stars appear at night, the patterns on its back grow larger.
It is said that in lands with clean air, where the stars fill the sky, there live many LEDIAN. For good reason, they use the light of the stars as energy.
The star patterns on its back grow larger or smaller depending on the number of stars in the night sky.
When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.
When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.
When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.
In battle, it throws punches with all four arms. The power of each individual blow is piddly, so it aims to win by quantity rather than quality.
It is said that in lands with clean air, where the stars fill the sky, there live Ledian in countless numbers. There is a good reason for this—the Pokémon uses the light of the stars as its energy.
It uses starlight as energy. When more stars appear at night, the patterns on its back grow larger.
It uses starlight as energy. When more stars appear at night, the patterns on its back grow larger.
It is said that in lands with clean air, where the stars fill the sky, there live LEDIAN in countless numbers. There is a good reason for this - the POKéMON uses the light of the stars as its energy.
It is said that in lands with clean air, where the stars fill the sky, there live LEDIAN in countless numbers. There is a good reason for this - the POKéMON uses the light of the stars as its energy.
The star patterns on its back grow larger or smaller depending on the number of stars in the night sky.
The spot patterns on its back grow larger or smaller depending on the number of stars in the night sky.
While it’s believed that starlight provides it with energy, this Pokémon also loves to eat berries. In the daytime, it curls up in the grass to sleep.
It flies through the night sky, sprinkling sparkly dust. According to some, if that dust sticks to you, good things will happen to you.
It’s said that the patterns on its back are related to the stars in the night sky, but the details of that relationship remain unclear.
It uses starlight as energy. When more stars appear at night, the patterns on its back grow larger.
It uses starlight as energy. When more stars appear at night, the patterns on its back grow larger.
When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.
The spot patterns on its back grow larger or smaller depending on the number of stars in the night sky.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It is said that in lands with clean air, where the stars fill the sky, there live Ledian in countless numbers. There is a good reason for this—the Pokémon uses the light of the stars as its energy.

pokemon:ledyba.name: Ledyba
pokemon:ledyba.summary: Ledyba secretes an aromatic fluid from where its legs join its body. This fluid is used for communicating with others. This Pokémon conveys its feelings to others by altering the fluid’s scent.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Ledyba secretes an aromatic fluid from where its legs join its body. This fluid is used for communicating with others. This Pokémon conveys its feelings to others by altering the fluid’s scent.
It is so timid, it can’t move if it isn’t with a swarm of others. It conveys its feelings with scent.
It is so timid, it can’t move if it isn’t with a swarm of others. It conveys its feelings with scent.
It is timid and clusters together with others. The fluid secreted by its feet indicates its location.
It is so timid, it can’t move if it isn’t with a swarm of others. It conveys its feelings with scent.
LEDYBA communicate using a fluid that they secrete from where the legs join the body. They are said to convey feelings to others by altering the fluid’s scent.
When the weather turns cold, numerous LEDYBA gather from everywhere to cluster and keep each other warm.
It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.
It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.
It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.
They communicate with one another using bodily fluids that give off odors. When they’re angry, their odor smells sour.
Ledyba secretes an aromatic fluid from where its legs join its body. This fluid is used for communicating with others. This Pokémon conveys its feelings to others by altering the fluid’s scent.
It is so timid, it can’t move if it isn’t with a swarm of others. It conveys its feelings with scent.
It is so timid, it can’t move if it isn’t with a swarm of others. It conveys its feelings with scent.
LEDYBA secretes an aromatic fluid from where its legs join its body. This fluid is used for communicating with others. This POKéMON conveys its feelings to others by altering the fluid’s scent.
LEDYBA secretes an aromatic fluid from where its legs join its body. This fluid is used for communicating with others. This POKéMON conveys its feelings to others by altering the fluid’s scent.
When the weather turns cold, lots of LEDYBA gather from everywhere to cluster and keep each other warm.
When the weather turns cold, lots of LEDYBA gather from everywhere to cluster and keep each other warm.
They are timid and grow uneasy when not in a swarm with others of their kind. The pattern on their backs differs slightly from one to another.
These very cowardly Pokémon join together and use Reflect to protect their nest.
This Pokémon is very sensitive to cold. In the warmth of Alola, it appears quite lively.
It is so timid, it can’t move if it isn’t with a swarm of others. It conveys its feelings with scent.
It is so timid, it can’t move if it isn’t with a swarm of others. It conveys its feelings with scent.
When the weather turns cold, lots of Ledyba gather from everywhere to cluster and keep each other warm.
It is timid and clusters together with others. The fluid secreted by its feet indicates its location.

loreSummary: Ledyba secretes an aromatic fluid from where its legs join its body. This fluid is used for communicating with others. This Pokémon conveys its feelings to others by altering the fluid’s scent.
